title: gonystylus nervosus
intro: Gonystylus nervosus, also known as Yellow Ironwood, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia and parts of the Pacific. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gonystylus nervosus include pain relief, wound healing, and the treatment of fever and rheumatism. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in the form of dried roots and bark for various medicinal purposes.
